query:
-- Check the 15 remaining customer_matched tiab_services
SELECT ts.tiabServiceId, ts.msisdn, ts.planName, ts.status,
       tc.internalCustomerExternalId, tc.companyName,
       -- Check if there's a service with this MSISDN
       (SELECT s.externalId FROM services s WHERE s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn LIMIT 1) as matchingServiceId
FROM tiab_services ts
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
WHERE ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched'
ORDER BY ts.status, ts.msisdn;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Check the 15 remaining customer_matched tiab_services
SELECT ts.tiabServiceId, ts.msisdn, ts.planName, ts.status,
       tc.internalCustomerExternalId, tc.companyName,
       -- Check if there's a service with this MSISDN
       (SELECT s.externalId FROM services s WHERE s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn LIMIT 1) as matchingServiceId
FROM tiab_services ts
JOIN tiab_customers tc ON ts.tiabCustomerId = tc.tiabCustomerId
WHERE ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched'
ORDER BY ts.status, ts.msisdn;
